## Bug report

NetworkPolicy default-deny was applied to the staging namespace and broke the egress to the DB. Pod disruption budget is set to 0 for the payments service — we can't drain the node. The cluster autoscaler can't scale from zero because the instance group has no node labels. Pod affinity rule is too strict — we want soft-anti-affinity across zones, currently set to hard.
